heading: Ethics
label: 2129 Ethics
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (b). substituted “.” for “section 102 of the Ethics in Government Act of 1978 (5 U.S.C. App.).”Pub. L. 117–286section 13104 of title 5
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (b). substituted “.” for “section 102 of the Ethics in Government Act of 1978 (5 U.S.C. App.).”Pub. L. 117–286section 13104 of title 5

children.heading: Conflict of interest
children.label: a Conflict of interest
children.text: Notwithstanding any ethics provision governing employees of the covered territory, all members and staff of the Oversight Board shall be subject to the Federal conflict of interest requirements described in .section 208 of title 18

children.heading: Financial disclosure
children.label: b Financial disclosure
children.text: Notwithstanding any ethics provision governing employees of the covered territory, all members of the Oversight Board and staff designated by the Oversight Board shall be subject to disclosure of their financial interests, the contents of which shall conform to the same requirements set forth in .section 13104 of title 5
